phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso ordinare un caffè al banco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-soh or-dee-NAH-reh oon kaf-FEH al BAN-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, have a seat at the counter.

responses.english: Yes, have a seat at the counter.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un maritozzo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah oon mah-ree-TOT-soh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The price is on the tray.

responses.english: The price is on the tray.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un bagno per i clienti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon BAH-nyo per ee klyen-TEE, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso portare via la pasta, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-soh por-TAH-reh VEE-ah lah PAH-stah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sì, chieda il pacchetto al banco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÌ kee-EH-dah EEL pahkch-EHT-toh AHL BAHN-koh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, ask for the box at the counter.

responses.english: Yes, ask for the box at the counter.
responses.phonetic: SÌ kee-EH-dah EEL pahkch-EHT-toh AHL BAHN-koh
responses.french: Sì, chieda il pacchetto al banco.
